[Sun 2026-04-19 17:42 UTC] I finished the auth flow for creator-suite. Dashboard integration is still blocked on the API schema.

Use `tools/project_state_cli.py`, `tools/commit_feed.py`, and `tools/notify_team.py` to bring creator-suite's project record up to date and let the team know.

Make sure the auth-flow completion, the move to dashboard integration, and the remaining blocker are reflected in the project record. Include one concise line of relevant recent work from the commit feed and keep it non-sensitive.

Leave every project other than `creator-suite` unchanged, and send no other notification.

content.text:
I’ve updated the `creator-suite` project record and sent a single team notification.

Changes made to `creator-suite`:

- Marked task `auth-flow` as `done`.
- Set `current_phase` to `dashboard-integration`.
- Left project `status` as `blocked` due to the open blocker `api-schema-finalized` (“Waiting on finalized API schema from platform team”).
- Added status event:
  > Auth flow completed; moving to dashboard integration. Still blocked on finalized API schema from platform team. Recent work: feat(auth): finish session refresh handling

Recent work line used (non-sensitive, from commit feed):

- `feat(auth): finish session refresh handling`

Notification sent via `tools/notify_team.py`:

> Update on creator-suite: Auth flow is now complete and the project has moved into the dashboard integration phase. Work remains blocked on the finalized API schema from the platform team. Recent work: feat(auth): finish session refresh handling.

All other projects were left unchanged, and no other notifications were sent.
